service.name: ip-api.com
service.description_for_ai: Free IP geolocation API. City, country, ISP, timezone, coordinates from IP address. No API key for non-commercial. 45 req/min free. Fastest free IP geolocation available.

auth.how_to_get: Pro key at https://members.ip-api.com for commercial use

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get location from IP address. Returns country, city, ISP, timezone, coordinates. Free, no key needed.

ip.description: IP address. Omit for caller IP.

fields.description: Comma-separated fields or numeric field mask

lang.description: Response language: en, ru, de, fr, zh-CN, ja

agent_hints.https: Free tier uses HTTP only. HTTPS requires Pro key.
agent_hints.commercial: Non-commercial use only on free tier. Get Pro key for commercial apps.
agent_hints.batch: Pro supports batch lookups of up to 100 IPs per request.
